Ex Parte Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Sep-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Continued To Nov-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Valencia for Linda Morrison. Jeffrey Loew for Ed Barney and Laura McQuade.

Counsel stated that they agree to mediate, that they want to conduct discovery and that they want to return in mid October. Mr. Valencia asked for some authority for his Client to pay estate bills. The Court encouraged the Parties to agree on a Special Administrator and file an ex parte petition with waiver of notice to everyone. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 14, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 14, 2014. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the will contest were continued to and the Parties are to return on November 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
